case_title: ANISE JACKSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Dismissal on file. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-16-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To May-14-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-14-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to JAN-29-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

*** After hearing, Court received a letter from plaintiff requesting a continuance of the OSC. Per Court, written sanctions are not issued. The OSC is continued to MAR-12-2019 at 10:30am in Dept. 610. ***

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Continued To Dec-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
